terms.anchor_note: ANCHOR: Eph 1:21 — power in cosmic hierarchy. Lk 9:1 — power and authority over demons. 1Cor 15:24 — destroying every power.
PRIMARY ANCHOR: Mt 28:18 — all authority given to Christ. Jn 19:10-11 — authority from above. Rom 13:1 — no authority except from God. Rev 12:10 — authority of his Christ.
ANCHOR: Gen 14:20 — delivered into your hand. Gen 31:29 — in my power to harm. 2Ki 8:20 — rule of Judah idiom.
ANCHOR: 2Sa 7:13-16 — throne established forever. Dan 7:9 — Ancient of Days seated. Isa 66:1 — heaven is my throne.
ANCHOR: Eph 1:21 — above all rule and authority. Col 2:10,15 — head of rule/authority; disarmed. Jude 6 — angels left their proper archē.
ANCHOR: Gen 1:18 — rule day/night; Gen 4:7 — rule over sin; Ps 22:28 — dominion to LORD.
ANCHOR: Dan 7:13-14 — everlasting dominion to Son of Man. Dan 4:34-35 — Nebuchadnezzar's doxology. Dan 7:27 — dominion to saints.
